new_content.name: Eureka Pagos
new_content.description: The Forbidden Land, Eureka Pagos, is an instanced area for up to 144 players featuring an elemental level cap increase to 35, Notorious Monsters, and Happy Bunny treasure hunting.

new_content.name: The Great Hunt
new_content.description: A battle against a mighty Rathalos. Players must carve scales from the remains for rewards.

new_content.name: The Great Hunt (Extreme)
new_content.description: A high-end trial version of the Rathalos battle for four players with limited resurrection mechanics.

new_content.name: And We Shall Call It Pagos
new_content.description: Side story quest required to access Eureka Pagos.

new_content.name: The New King on the Block
new_content.description: Special side story quest for the Monster Hunter: World collaboration.

new_content.name: The Newer King on the Block
new_content.description: Special side story quest required to unlock The Great Hunt (Extreme).

new_content.name: Elemental Level Sync
new_content.description: A system introduced to Eureka Anemos that automatically syncs players level 21 or higher to level 20.

new_content.name: Happy Bunnies
new_content.description: A feature in Eureka Pagos where rescued bunnies assist players in finding hidden buried coffers.

new_content.name: Eureka Effect
new_content.description: Gear enhancement system in Eureka Pagos providing special attributes not available to regular equipment at item level 300.

housing.name: Chainmail Hanger
housing.description: No matter how identical this hanger may be to a dress hanger, to hang anything but chainmail on it would be blasphemy.

housing.name: Stuffed Happy Bunny
housing.description: This plush rabbit is so realistic that it is rumored to bring fortune, just like a real happy bunny would, to all who come across it. All except those who are prone to allergies, anyway.

housing.name: Crossed Halberds
housing.description: A wall decoration featuring a shield over crossed halberds.
